		"ds_0QRvjtTV_ds_PFzJGC68_ds_kzABf4Dl": {
			"name": "SSO protocol distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR (EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203) AND (\"$user_input$\" OR \"the organization-AD\\\\$user_input$\"))) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*)\n| rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\"\n| rex field=_raw \"redirect_uri=(?<ru_raw>[^&]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<AuthProtocol>(?<auth_protocol>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<ProxyServer>(?<proxy_server>[^<]+)\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaPerformed>(?<mfa_flag_txt>true|false)</MfaPerformed>\"\n| rex field=_raw \"<MfaMethod>(?<mfa_method_tmp>[^<]+)</MfaMethod>\"\n| eval mfa_flag = if(mfa_flag_txt==\"true\",1,0)\n| eval mfa_method = if(EventCode==1200, mfa_method_tmp, null())\n| eval ru1 = urldecode(trim(ru_raw))\n| eval ru2 = replace(ru1, \"\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}(?:\\s\\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2})?\", \"\")\n| eval ru3 = replace(ru2, \"[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36}\", \"\")\n| eval ru4 = replace(replace(ru3, \"A\", \"://\"), \"F\", \"/\")\n| eval ru5 = replace(ru4, \"^(https?)0*\\d+/\", \"\\1://\")\n| eval ru6 = replace(ru5, \"/[0-9A-Fa-f]/\", \"/\")\n| eval redirect_uri = replace(ru6, \"^(https?)[A-Za-z0-9]{2}/\", \"\\1://\")\n| eval redirect_uri = replace(redirect_uri, \"/+\", \"/\")\n| eval redirect_uri = replace(redirect_uri, \"^https:/\", \"https://host.example.gov
/$\"), substr(redirect_uri, 1, len(redirect_uri)-1), redirect_uri)\n| eval redirect_host = \"https://host.example.gov

/"), 2)
| eval user_raw = coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user)
| eval user     = replace(user_raw, "^the organization-AD\\\\", "")
| stats
    min(_time)               as start_time
    max(_time)               as end_time
    values(EventCode)        as stages
    count                    as event_count
    values(relying_party_raw) as rps_raw
    values(auth_protocol)     as protos
    values(redirect_uri)      as redirect_uri
    values(redirect_host)     as redirect_host
    values(host)              as servers
    values(proxy_server)      as proxy_servers
    values(user)              as users
    max(mfa_flag)             as mfa_flag
    values(mfa_method)        as mfa_methods
  by activity_id
| eval mfa         = if(mfa_flag==1, "MFA", "No MFA")
| eval mfa_method  = mvindex(mfa_methods, 0)
| eval rps_raw     = mvdedup(rps_raw)
| eval rp_clean    = mvfilter(rps_raw!="WS-Trust endpoint (legacy clients)" AND rps_raw!="https://host.example.gov/[redacted-path] eval relying_party = coalesce(mvindex(rp_clean, 0), mvindex(rps_raw, 0))
| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as relying_party       output friendlyName as rp_friendly
| eval relying_party = coalesce(rp_friendly, relying_party)
| eval proto_raw   = lower(mvindex(mvfilter(len(protos)>0),0))
| eval protocol    = case(
    match(proto_raw,"oauth"), "OIDC",
    match(proto_raw,"saml"),  "SAML",
    match(proto_raw,"wsfed"), "WS-Fed",
    1=1,                       "Other"
  )
| eval user        = mvindex(users, 0)
| lookup ADFS_friendly_names url as redirect_host      output friendlyName as uri_friendly_host
| lookup ADFS_friendly_names.csv url as redirect_uri       output friendlyName as uri_friendly_full
| eval uri_friendly = coalesce(uri_friendly_full, uri_friendly_host)
| eval is_proxy    = if(mvcount(mvfilter(proxy_servers!="N/A"))>0,1,0)
| eval cred_ok     = if(mvfind(stages,"1202")>=0,1,0)
| eval cred_fail   = if(mvfind(stages,"1203")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_ok    = if(mvfind(stages,"1200")>=0,1,0)
| eval token_fail  = if(mvfind(stages,"1201")>=0,1,0)
| eval outcome     = case(
    token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,  "Success",
    token_fail==1,                "Token Failure",
    cred_fail==1,                 "Credential Failure",
    1=1,                          "Other"
  )
| where outcome!="Other"
| lookup adfs_event_codes code as stages output label as stage_word
| eval stage_seq   = mvjoin(mvzip(stages, stage_word, " "), " -> ")
| eval duration_sec= round(end_time-start_time,2)
| eval time        = strftime(start_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eval application = case(protocol=="OIDC", coalesce(uri_friendly, redirect_uri), 1=1, relying_party)
| eval app_url     = coalesce(redirect_uri, mvindex(rp_clean,0), mvindex(rps_raw,0))
| eval flow        = case(is_proxy==1, "WAP->ADFS", 1=1, "ADFS-only")
| eval mfa_method_label = case(
    mfa_method=="MFA", "Duo Push (fresh MFA)",
    mfa_method=="SSO", "Session SSO (no new MFA)",
    mfa_method=="N/A", "No MFA (App Policy)",
    1=1,               "Unknown"
  )
| rename
    time             as Time,
    user             as User,
    application      as Application,
    protocol         as Protocol,
    flow             as Flow,
    outcome          as Result,
    app_url          as "App URL",
    duration_sec     as Duration,
    stage_seq        as "Stage Seq",
    event_count      as Events,
    mfa              as MFA,
    mfa_method_label as "MFA Method",
    activity_id      as "Activity ID"
| stats count by Protocol",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_15CBMcd4_ds_wnzG5BYI": {
			"name": "Duo factor distribution",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=duo username="$user_input$"
| eval time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eval user=mvindex(username, 0), factor=mvindex(factor, 0), integration=mvindex(integration, 0), result=mvindex(result, 0)
| stats count by factor",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
